ecs.taskdefinition.volumefrom.CfnAbout: Details on a data volume from another container in the same task definition.

ecs.taskdefinition.volumefrom.ReadOnly.Description: If this value is `true`, the container has read-only access to the volume. If this value is `false`, then the container can write to the volume. The default value is `false`.

ecs.taskdefinition.volumefrom.SourceCont.Description: The name of another container within the same task definition to mount volumes from.
